name: @justfortytwo/magrathea
description: All-in-one installer and lifecycle CLI for justfortytwo — scaffolds the persona surface and provisions the npm engine (guide MCP, safety gate, channel adapters, embedder).

fortytwo.comment: Compatibility contract this CLI version was authored against. doctor cross-checks the *installed* sibling packages against these ranges; update/rollback record the resolved set into .fortytwo/state.json. TODO(wire): bump these as sibling contracts evolve.
